signals.headline: SEC Roundtable on CLARITY Act Implementation | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Roundtable on CLARITY Act Implementation | YES | HIGH confidence**
The SEC roundtable addressing CLARITY Act implementation details is occurring today (April 16), with SEC Chairman Atkins confirmed as ready to discuss the regulatory framework.[1] This event was explicitly scheduled as one of three critical April dates for XRP price movement.

signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Senate Vote Timeline Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: XRP Classified as Digital Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Classified as Digital Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**
The SEC and CFTC officially classified XRP as a **digital commodity in March**, removing prior regulatory uncertainty that had constrained institutional adoption.[2]
